retrieved_result: City Circle Acting Company City Circle Acting Company of Coralville presented its first season in 1998, which consisted of Nunsense, The Lion in Winter, and The Boys Next Door. They originally performed in Oakdale Auditorium in Coralville. More recently, they have performed shows at the Englert Theatre and The Iowa Children's
